mano_cua.result_summary: 确认严重无障碍缺陷：肤色选择器6个色块(data-skin=1~6)全部role=null、aria-label=null、tabIndex=-1。容器div.emoji-mart-skin-swatches同样无role/aria-label/aria-expanded。Tab键导航顺序为搜索栏→emoji滚动区→完全跳过肤色选择器。swatch.focus()调用后active element仍为INPUT（搜索栏）。JS审计确认可聚焦元素仅有BUTTON.emoji-mart-anchor和INPUT，肤色span不在Tab序列中。无描述性标签(Default Skin Tone/Light Skin Tone等)、无role=radiogroup容器、无aria-checked选中状态、不支持方向键导航。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All 6 skin tone swatches have role=null, aria-label=null, tabIndex=-1. Container has no role/aria-label/aria-expanded. Keyboard Tab navigation completely skips skin tone selector. Not accessible to screen readers or keyboard users.
